TITLE: Simplify

INGREDIENTS:
- 1 cup flour
- 2 tsp baking powder
- 1/4 tsp salt
- 1/3 cup shortening (crisco)
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup milk

INSTRUCTIONS:
[all cooking steps]

TEMPERATURE: [oven temp if shown]

Note: The image shows a handwritten recipe, and the text is as follows:

Simplify

INGREDIENTS:
- 1 cup flour
- 2 tsp baking powder
- 1/4 tsp salt
- 1/3 cup shortening (crisco)
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup milk

INSTRUCTIONS:
[all cooking steps]

TEMPERATURE: [oven temp if shown]

The handwritten recipe includes the following instructions:

1. Mix flour, baking powder and salt together in a bowl.
2. Cut shortening into mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add egg to milk and mix well.
4. Pour liquid ingredients over dry ingredients and stir just enough to moisten the dough. Do not beat or overmix.
5. Turn out onto floured surface, knead lightly 10 times. Roll out to desired thickness. Cut into squares with a pizza cutter.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.

The recipe does not provide specific measurements for the ingredients and does not include any additional instructions beyond those listed above. The oven temperature is also not specified in this handwritten version of the recipe.

structured.title: Simplify
instructions: Mix flour, baking powder and salt together in a bowl.
Cut shortening into mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Add egg to milk and mix well.
Pour liquid ingredients over dry ingredients and stir just enough to moisten the dough. Do not beat or overmix.
Turn out onto floured surface, knead lightly 10 times. Roll out to desired thickness. Cut into squares with a pizza cutter.
Bake at 375 degrees for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
